title: Sure im lover grrrl
content:
Sure im lover grrrl 
Dreaming away
In sublime gardens
Summery ideals
But these dreams are not the paper thin allusions of the subconscious 
They are the fruit of a forlorn sacrifice 
Strengthening my resolve
To find some one to pour into the ethereal the ephemeral the mortal eternal

title: I hope you had all the fun. I am sad that we didn't get to meet up but seems like you did a lot of c
content: I hope you had all the fun. I am sad that we didn't get to meet up but seems like you did a lot of cool things. Hopefully we can have our New York City moments someday. title: This is a letter it's about how I am very happy for you. Very excited about this new time in your li
content: This is a letter it's about how I am very happy for you. Very excited about this new time in your life wondering if it is what you expected. I think a lot of people wanna send kind words obviously that is really the primary intent, but I think also an encouragement to be aware of the totality of experience you know, birth as the change of life processes beginning processes ending, so that's to say taking it all into effect and taking some time to understand how you might need to put some things down for a moment but then stay hopeful that soon again you can pick them up remembering this idea of patience that for someone who is really passionate about something about someone time is really not overly important as there's a grander vision that is resonating continuously so that's to say believe in all your dreams and believe in all the people that care for you and you care for Cuuuutie miliiii
full_content: This is a letter it's about how I am very happy for you. Very excited about this new time in your life wondering if it is what you expected. title: To save his people from a gruesome tribute, the Athenian hero Theseus ventured into the Cretan Labyr
content: To save his people from a gruesome tribute, the Athenian hero Theseus ventured into the Cretan Labyrinth to slay the half-man, half-bull Minotaur. He succeeded with the help of Princess Ariadne, who fell in love with him and provided a "clew" of thread to navigate the impossible maze. After defeating the beast in its heart, Theseus used the thread to retrace his steps back to the entrance, escaping with Ariadne and the other Athenian captives
full_content: To save his people from a gruesome tribute, the Athenian hero Theseus ventured into the Cretan Labyrinth to slay the half-man, half-bull Minotaur. He succeeded with the help of Princess Ariadne, who fell in love with him and provided a "clew" of thread to navigate the impossible maze. After defeating the beast in its heart, Theseus used the thread to retrace his steps back to the entrance, escaping with Ariadne and the other Athenian captives

title: Oh no…so sad :/ I can't believe I was just walking around her beautiful house on a little prairie mo
content: Oh no…so sad :/ I can't believe I was just walking around her beautiful house on a little prairie months ago. She was so close with her daughter too. She was living such a nice life and a real example of being authentic and honest in warm and funny way. I had so many nice experiences with her over the years. Such sad news.

title: Loved the connection she had with her daughter becky. It was so cute to see them all calling her gra
content: Loved the connection she had with her daughter becky. It was so cute to see them all calling her grammy. Made me want to live a mid west life. Rooting for the cubs. Walking thru the prairies smelling the fresh air. Looking at the native flowers with their tiny pedals.
